title: KELLERAI_LAAS OSI custom_extension data payload
description: Schema for the `data` object of an OSI custom_extensions entry whose vendor_name is "KELLERAI_LAAS". The three governance axes (reversibility, scope, consequence) are REQUIRED when the extension is present; their enum values are exactly the keys of data["laas"]["tier_lattice"] in conformance/laas/data.json. A drift test asserts these enums equal the lattice keys.

escape_rate_tolerance.description: Optional Bucket-B residual escape-rate tolerance for actions on this object.

access_sensitive.description: Optional. When true the converter coerces scope to "public" at build time (OSI models no access control; graph reach != permission reach).
